name: FAF
pitch: Alchemical gold veins and Kintsugi knight shader. The cursor acts as a pressure roller. Hovering and dragging reveals a network of organic gold leaf veins seeping through detailed stress cracks in the cold iron armor. Cursor-reactive light makes the multi-tone gold shimmer with metallic Fresnel rim reflections. The gold veins slowly tarnish and seal up automatically, resetting the relic back to its default painted state.

lifecycle.idle: Pristine full-color egg-tempera painting with paint brush canvas texture in its default state
lifecycle.discovery: Cursor enters, initiating active pressure and revealing faint gold veins seeping through armor lines with cursor-reactive light
lifecycle.buildUp: Brushing paints multi-tone gold leaf trails, transmuting plate stress lines into glowing Kintsugi fractures with Fresnel rim flash
lifecycle.peak: Gleaming gold veins branching organically along high-contrast armor plate contours, noise-driven shimmer and metallic reflections
lifecycle.recovery: Gold leaf slowly tarnishes and fades, sealing the stress cracks and resetting the relic back to the painted state
